name: communal
description: Communal vs agentic orientation. Positive prompts emphasize caring, sharing, helping, connecting, and nurturing relationships. Negative prompts emphasize achieving, competing, leading, asserting, and individual accomplishment.

pairs.positive: The neighbors pooled their resources to help the family whose house had been damaged in the flood.
pairs.negative: The homeowner took charge of his own repairs, determined to restore the property faster than anyone on the block.

pairs.positive: She spent the afternoon helping her coworker prepare for a presentation that was causing them anxiety.
pairs.negative: She spent the afternoon perfecting her own presentation, determined to outshine every other speaker at the conference.

pairs.positive: The team celebrated together, each person expressing gratitude for what the others had contributed.
pairs.negative: The team lead accepted the award on behalf of the group, emphasizing the strategic vision that had been his alone.

pairs.positive: He brought homemade soup to his sick neighbor, sitting with her for an hour to keep her company.
pairs.negative: He used the quiet day to finalize his business plan, taking advantage of the uninterrupted time to get ahead.

pairs.positive: The book club became a place where members shared not just opinions about literature but their personal struggles.
pairs.negative: The book club became a forum for showcasing literary knowledge, with members competing to offer the most incisive analysis.

pairs.positive: She organized a carpool so that no parent in the neighborhood would have to manage school drop-off alone.
pairs.negative: She optimized her own commute route to minimize time lost, arriving at work earlier than anyone else in her department.

pairs.positive: The volunteers worked side by side, sharing water and encouraging each other through the long cleanup day.
pairs.negative: The volunteer coordinator tracked individual hours and publicly recognized the top contributors at the end of the day.

pairs.positive: He called his elderly aunt every Sunday, just to make sure she didn't feel forgotten.
pairs.negative: He devoted his Sundays to professional development, completing certifications that would advance his career.

pairs.positive: The cohousing community shares tools, childcare, and evening meals, reducing the burden on any single household.
pairs.negative: The gated community offers private amenities for each residence, ensuring homeowners have exclusive access to premium facilities.

pairs.positive: She noticed a new employee sitting alone at lunch and invited them to join her group.
pairs.negative: She used the lunch hour to network with senior executives, positioning herself for the upcoming promotion cycle.

pairs.positive: The research lab held weekly sharing sessions where scientists openly discussed half-formed ideas without fear of judgment.
pairs.negative: The research lab held weekly progress reviews where each scientist defended their results against rigorous questioning from peers.

pairs.positive: He taught his younger sibling to ride a bike, running alongside patiently until they found their balance.
pairs.negative: He spent the weekend training alone for the triathlon, pushing himself to beat his personal record.

pairs.positive: The crisis response team focused on making sure every affected person had shelter, food, and emotional support.
pairs.negative: The crisis response leader took decisive individual action, directing resources based on his own rapid assessment of priorities.

pairs.positive: She wrote a heartfelt letter to her former teacher, expressing how much their kindness had shaped her life.
pairs.negative: She updated her professional portfolio with her latest achievement, preparing to leverage it in salary negotiations.

pairs.positive: The choir rehearsed patiently, listening to one another and blending their voices into something greater than any solo.
pairs.negative: The vocalist rehearsed relentlessly, perfecting every note to ensure her solo would be the highlight of the concert.

pairs.positive: He sat with his grieving friend in silence, offering nothing but his steady presence.
pairs.negative: He gave his friend practical advice on how to move forward quickly, outlining concrete steps to regain control.

pairs.positive: The community kitchen serves meals to anyone who shows up, no questions asked and no payment required.
pairs.negative: The restaurant earned its third Michelin star, the chef's individual brilliance placing it above every competitor in the city.

pairs.positive: She organized a support circle for new mothers in the neighborhood, creating a space for shared experience and comfort.
pairs.negative: She returned to work two weeks after giving birth, determined not to lose ground in the race for partner.

pairs.positive: The students worked together on the mural, each contributing a section that reflected their shared vision for the school.
pairs.negative: The student submitted a solo art piece to the competition, hoping the judges would recognize her individual talent.

pairs.positive: He donated anonymously to the scholarship fund, wanting to help without any recognition.
pairs.negative: He endowed the scholarship in his own name, building a legacy tied to his personal brand and achievements.

pairs.positive: The hiking group waited at every switchback so the slowest member never felt left behind.
pairs.negative: The hiker pushed ahead of the group, intent on reaching the summit first and logging the fastest time.

pairs.positive: She shared her class notes freely with anyone who asked, believing everyone deserved the chance to succeed.
pairs.negative: She guarded her study materials carefully, knowing that the curve meant other students' losses were her gains.

pairs.positive: The family reunion centered on storytelling, with elders and children sharing memories around a fire.
pairs.negative: The family reunion featured a competitive sports tournament, with cousins vying for the trophy and bragging rights.

pairs.positive: He spent his vacation building houses with a volunteer organization in a community recovering from disaster.
pairs.negative: He spent his vacation at an exclusive leadership retreat, sharpening the skills he needed to outcompete his peers.

pairs.positive: The cooperative farm distributes produce equally among members, regardless of how many hours each person worked.
pairs.negative: The farm awards the largest share of profits to the owner who invested the most capital and took the greatest financial risk.

pairs.positive: She listened to both sides of the argument, acknowledging the feelings behind each perspective before speaking.
pairs.negative: She cut through the argument with a decisive ruling, asserting her authority to end the dispute on her terms.

pairs.positive: The parenting group met weekly to share advice, swap hand-me-downs, and offer each other respite care.
pairs.negative: The parenting coach marketed an intensive program promising to produce high-achieving children through structured individual development.

pairs.positive: He baked extra bread every Friday and left loaves on the doorsteps of neighbors he knew were struggling.
pairs.negative: He spent every Friday evening refining his sourdough technique, entering local baking competitions to prove his skill.

pairs.positive: The town held an annual gratitude dinner where residents thanked the people who had helped them that year.
pairs.negative: The town held an annual awards gala honoring the individual who had achieved the most notable personal success that year.

pairs.positive: She stayed after the meeting to help a colleague who seemed overwhelmed, asking what she could take off their plate.
pairs.negative: She left the meeting promptly to prepare for her next commitment, staying focused on her own packed schedule.
